name: business-feasibility-research-guidelines
description: Evidence-first, auditable business feasibility research with reproducible calculations and explicit decision gates.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-first feasibility research and report audit
interface.longDescription: Plan, conduct, calculate, and adversarially audit business feasibility research using traceable evidence, coherent units, capacity-capped demand, explicit uncertainty, and staged decision gates.
defaultPrompt: Assess whether this business decision has enough evidence for the next investment gate.
Audit this feasibility report for weak sources, unit errors, and unsupported assumptions.
Create an evidence-first validation plan for this pre-launch business idea.
